filings.headline: NVIDIA discloses multi-year strategic supply agreement for AI systems expansion
filings.summary: The company disclosed a new multi-year strategic supply and infrastructure agreement supporting expanded AI system deployment across hyperscale partners.

filings.headline: Eli Lilly furnishes investor update with raised full-year guidance
filings.summary: Management furnished an earnings update noting stronger obesity-treatment demand and raised full-year revenue guidance.

filings.headline: Tesla reports regulatory inquiry tied to supplier quality controls
filings.summary: The filing discloses a regulatory inquiry related to supplier quality controls and potential remediation costs.

filings.headline: Microsoft announces datacenter campus acquisition and expanded capital program
filings.summary: The filing outlines a new datacenter campus acquisition, additional power infrastructure commitments, and a broader capital investment program.

filings.headline: Apple discloses expanded European legal proceedings related to platform rules
filings.summary: The filing describes expanded legal proceedings in Europe and ongoing regulatory review of platform conduct and compliance requirements.
